name: Central Jersey Bus Inc
districts_or_customers: Listed as bus charter vendor (NY production directory); no confirmed K-12 district contracts
recent_news: Active USDOT 569536 / MC 276940 motor carrier registered in Basking Ridge; website centraljerseybus.com now redirects to GogoCharters aggregator, suggesting a small/dormant operation
fit_notes: Very small mailbox-suite operator (PMB 309) in Basking Ridge; appears to be a charter/coach broker rather than a contracted yellow-bus school operator. Not an obvious Summit tuck-in unless verified to hold school district contracts.

name: Kids Taxi Svc
districts_or_customers: Concord/Contra Costa County area; no specific school district contracts identified
recent_news: No M&A or news identified; listed in local directories as buses/school transportation service in Concord, CA
fit_notes: Likely a micro kids-shuttle / after-school transport operation rather than a yellow-bus contractor; too small and undocumented to be a meaningful Summit tuck-in target.

name: Bob! Board Our Bus
districts_or_customers: Golf tournaments, music festivals, Super Bowls, group/event shuttles around California; not a school district contractor
recent_news: Founder Bob Aube died April 29, 2024 after 17 years with neuroendocrine carcinoid cancer; obituary describes BOB as his 'final business' shuttling event groups
fit_notes: NOT a school-bus operator – this is/was a charter & event shuttle business run by the late Bob Aube. Post-founder status unclear. Out of scope for Summit's yellow-bus tuck-in thesis.

name: Ditter Brothers AG Bus
fleet_size_est: very small (~5 employees, rural farm-area operator)
districts_or_customers: Rural Weld County / eastern Greeley area; no confirmed district contracts (possible Weld RE district provider)
recent_news: No M&A, news, or public-record acquisition activity identified; address on Hwy 392 east of Greeley is rural/agricultural
fit_notes: Family-owned micro operator in rural Weld County; 'AG Bus' suggests farm/ag-worker transport in addition to (or instead of) traditional K-12 yellow-bus contracts. Too small to be a material Summit tuck-in absent unique district contract.

name: Lansing School Bus Svc
principals: Judy Durham (Manager) – note: surname coincidental; no link to Durham School Services / National Express / Summit
districts_or_customers: Lansing, KS area; Lansing USD 469 operates its own transportation dept (Director Jeff Bohnsack) so this entity likely serves private schools, athletic/activity charters, or a neighboring district
recent_news: No M&A or sale news identified; business remains listed/active at 104 Rock Creek Commercial Ct, Lansing KS
fit_notes: Small independent KS school-bus operator near Kansas City metro; Lansing USD 469 runs in-house transport, so this entity probably handles charter/activity work or serves another district – limited contract base makes it a marginal tuck-in target.
